title: (Bearish Signal) RDUS, Stochastic Oscillator left the overbought zone on March 25, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that RDUS's price trend could be reversing, and it may be an opportunity to sell the stock or take a defensive position. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 63 similar cases where RDUS's stochastic oscillator exited the overbought zone, and 55 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $21.83 is above $21.28 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/23/21 - 03/25/21, the price experienced a +20% Uptrend. During the week of 03/18/21 - 03/25/21, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/ont56om0ofp61.png?width=1531&format=png&auto=webp&s=e2f53153c6119615ff9a3717c1b3d9b913575cfe

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for RDUS moved out of overbought territory on March 23, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 29 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 23 of the 29 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 79%.

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 55 of 63 cases where RDUS's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 87%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 25, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on RDUS as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 81 of 97 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 84%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where RDUS declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10189549-radius-health-s-rdus-22-41-stochastic-oscillator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-march-25-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
